scripts.check: npm run verify:frontend && npm run verify:rust
scripts.tauri:build: tauri build && sh -c 'set -e; plist="src-tauri/target/release/bundle/macos/Perchnote.app/Contents/Info.plist"; set_or_add() { key=$1; value=$2; /usr/libexec/PlistBuddy -c "Set :$key $value" "$plist" 2>/dev/null || /usr/libexec/PlistBuddy -c "Add :$key string $value" "$plist"; }; set_or_add NSMicrophoneUsageDescription "Perchnote uses your microphone to record and transcribe meetings."; set_or_add NSScreenCaptureUsageDescription "Perchnote captures system audio to include computer audio in meeting recordings."; echo "Privacy strings injected"'
scripts.verify:rust: cd src-tauri && cargo check && cargo test --lib
scripts.verify:audit: npm run verify:tanstack-pin && npm audit && cd src-tauri && (cargo audit --version >/dev/null 2>&1 || (echo 'cargo audit is not installed. Install with: cargo install cargo-audit' >&2; exit 127)) && cargo audit
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run verify:audit
